meta.pricingNote: Study.com college-credit plans are billed monthly and typically limit the number of proctored exams per month. Confirm current pricing and exam limits at study.com — defaults are editable in Settings.
meta.dataNote: VERIFY BEFORE PURCHASING: Transfer equivalencies below are community-reported or inferred and were NOT confirmed against an official agreement. Treat every mapping as 'verify first'. Study.com is best used only for the small number of requirements Sophia cannot cover.

courses.name: Geography 101: Human & Cultural Geography
courses.tips: Sophia has no geography course, so this is the classic Study.com pickup for C255. Community-reported — verify against your agreement first.
courses.notes: Quiz after each lesson; the proctored final is the main event.

courses.name: Health 101: Principles of Health
courses.tips: Commonly reported as the fastest way to clear the 4-CU wellness requirement — verify it maps in your agreement (credit counts can differ).
courses.notes: Straightforward content; note C458 is 4 CUs at WGU while this is a 3-credit course — verify how WGU applies it.

courses.name: Communications 101: Public Speaking
courses.finalExam: Proctored final exam + recorded speech assignments
courses.tips: Only take if a Sophia communication course is NOT on your pathway. Needs manual review either way.
courses.notes: Includes graded speech assignments, which add turnaround time.

courses.name: Science 101: Intro to Natural Sciences
courses.tips: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — physical-science equivalency is the least consistent report. C165 at WGU is manageable; taking it there may be simpler.
courses.notes: Broad survey of physics, chemistry, earth and life science.

courses.name: English 104: College Composition I
courses.tips: Skip — Sophia's English Composition I covers the same slot cheaper and with no proctored final.
courses.notes: Listed for completeness; prefer the Sophia route.

courses.name: History 103: US History I
courses.tips: Skip — Sophia U.S. History I covers this slot without a proctored final.
courses.notes: Listed for completeness; prefer the Sophia route.

courses.name: Statistics 101: Principles of Statistics
courses.tips: Skip — Sophia Introduction to Statistics is the easier, cheaper route for the same slot.
courses.notes: Listed for completeness; prefer the Sophia route.

courses.name: Psychology 102: Educational Psychology
courses.wguEquivalent: No BAELED slot — professional core stays at WGU
courses.tips: Skip — WGU's professional education core (including educational psychology, D094) generally cannot be transferred in.
courses.notes: A common and costly mistake reported by the community — don't take this expecting D094 credit.
